option.shield-counter.enable_fall_shield: Allows an actively raised shield to reduce fall damage.
option.shield-counter.fall_damage_reduct: Fraction of fall damage prevented. 0.5 means 50%.
option.shield-counter.durability_cost_mu: Multiplies shield durability loss based on prevented damage. 0 disables durability loss.
option.shield-counter.require_shield_rai: Requires the shield to be raised for a minimum time before reducing fall damage.
option.shield-counter.min_shield_raise_t: Minimum active shield-use time. 20 ticks equals 1 second.
option.shield-counter.enable_shield_char: Accumulates charge while actively using a shield.
option.shield-counter.max_shield_charge_: Maximum stored shield charge. 20 ticks equals 1 second.
option.shield-counter.charge_stage_two_t: Charge required to enter stage 2. It is corrected to remain above stage 1.
option.shield-counter.charge_stage_three: Charge required for full charge. It cannot exceed the maximum charge.
